title: selaginella leptophylla var. wichurae
intro: Selaginella leptophylla var. wichurae, also known as Spikemoss, is a species of flowering plant in the family Selaginellaceae. It is a type of evergreen, terrestrial plant that belongs to the spikemoss family and is native to Mexico and Central America. The medicinal properties of Spikemoss include its use as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Spikemoss include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote digestion, with herbal preparations often taking the form of teas, infusions, or topical creams.
